about: I am Al Amin, a Computer Science and Engineering graduate from Daffodil International University (DIU), specializing in MERN stack development. I build fast, scalable, and user-friendly web applications from concept to deployment. I also actively practice competitive programming to strengthen my problem-solving skills and aim to create efficient and impactful software solutions. I have experience in real-world systems, AI-based applications, and modern deployment pipelines.

projects.name: N-Streaming (Video Streaming Platform)
projects.description: A modern MERN-based video streaming platform with video upload, adaptive playback, watch history, bookmarking, and content moderation features.

projects.name: Lost & Found Management System
projects.description: A platform for reporting and recovering lost items with role-based access, authentication, and structured item tracking system.

projects.name: Flurry Tasks (Task Management System)
projects.description: A task management platform with drag-and-drop support, task sharing, dynamic status updates, and real-time collaboration features.

projects.name: ChopStick House
projects.description: A restaurant management system where users can order food and chefs can manage menus dynamically.

projects.name: Wonder Spark Toy Store
projects.description: An online toy marketplace with multi-role system including customers, vendors, and admins.

projects.name: String Symphony
projects.description: An online course platform where users can purchase music lessons and access content.

projects.name: Gadget Shop
projects.description: An e-commerce platform for browsing and purchasing gadgets.

projects.name: Todo List App
projects.description: A simple todo application for managing daily tasks.

blogs.title: MongoDB as a NoSQL Database
blogs.summary: MongoDB is a flexible NoSQL database with dynamic schemas for handling unstructured data efficiently.

blogs.title: Postgres SQL
blogs.summary: Postgres is a powerful relational database with strong ACID compliance and advanced query capabilities.

blogs.summary: Using Express.js to build scalable and efficient backend applications with Node.js.

blogs.summary: Step-by-step guide to deploying MERN stack applications using Vercel.
